description: Easy - Marian Reforms, Equipment & Later Career

questions.question: What was the capite censi?
options: The wealthiest class of Roman citizens who served as cavalry
Military officers who commanded cohorts
Citizens who owned no property, counted 'by head' rather than by wealth
Priests who performed religious rituals before battle

questions.question: According to Livy, what did Cincinnatus do after saving Rome as dictator?
options: He declared himself king of Rome
He led an expedition to conquer Greece
He remained dictator until his death
He immediately resigned and returned to farming

questions.question: What was the gladius?
options: The silver eagle standard of a legion
A short sword used by Roman soldiers
A heavy javelin thrown before melee combat
A large curved shield

questions.question: Why were Marius's soldiers nicknamed 'Marius's mules'?
options: They rode mules instead of horses
They were known for their stubbornness in battle
They came from rural farming backgrounds
They carried their own equipment on the march

questions.question: How many men were in a Roman cohort after Marius's reforms?
options: About 100 men
About 480 men
About 1,000 men
About 5,000 men

questions.question: Who actually negotiated and received Jugurtha's surrender?
options: Marius himself
Metellus, the previous commander
Sulla, Marius's quaestor
Bocchus, king of Mauretania

questions.question: What happened to Jugurtha after his capture?
options: He was allowed to return to Numidia as a client king
He escaped and fled to Carthage
He was forced to serve in the Roman army
He was executed in the Tullianum prison

questions.question: What was the sacramentum?
options: The military oath sworn by soldiers to their general
The eagle standard of a Roman legion
The emergency decree of the Senate
The property requirement for military service

questions.question: What was the senatus consultum ultimum?
options: A vote to award a triumph to a victorious general
The annual election of new consuls
A treaty between Rome and a foreign power
An emergency decree authorizing magistrates to use force

questions.question: Who did Saturninus and Glaucia's followers murder, leading to their downfall?
options: Metellus, the former commander in Numidia
Gaius Memmius, a consular candidate
Sulla, Marius's rival
A tribune of the plebs
